load data

Code 
#simed
sim_data <- read_csv("processed_data/processed_simulated_data.csv")

#study
full_pre_empirical <- read_csv("processed_data/processed_empirical_data_full.csv")
posneg_pre_empirical <- read_csv("processed_data/processed_empirical_data_posneg.csv")

#pp
merged_rt_full <- read_csv("processed_data/merged_rt_full.csv")
merged_choice_full <- read_csv("processed_data/merged_choice_full.csv")


#str(sim_data)
#str(posneg_pre_empirical)
#str(merged_rt_full)
#str(merged_choice_full)

posneg_pre_empirical <- posneg_pre_empirical %>%
  mutate(
    affect_z_bin = factor(affect_z_bin,
                          levels = c("unpleasant", "neutral", "pleasant")),
    delta_posneg_sb_bin = factor(delta_posneg_sb_bin,
                                 levels = c("-100 to -60", "-60 to -20",
                                            "-20 to 20", "20 to 60", "60 to 100"))
  )

RUN MODELS ON EMPIRICAL DATA

MODEL: PREDICTED chose_pos ~ delta_posneg_sb by affect_z WITH EFFECT OF TIME (pretrip)

Code 
# Choice
  # Attempt 1: boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
    # choice_model_pretrip <- glmer(chose_pos ~ affect_z + delta_posneg_sb + ema_number +
    #                            (1 + affect_z + delta_posneg_sb + ema_number | PUNS_ID),
    #                          data = posneg_pre_empirical, family = binomial)

  # Attempt 2: converged and in hypothesized direction. sigificant positive main effect     of affect_z was positive aka in means pts are more likely to describe themselves          with the positive word in a pair when they are in a more pleasant mood than usual.       and when in more unpleasant mood than usual they are more likely to describe            themselves with the negative word in a pair 
 
choice_model_pretrip <- glmer(chose_pos ~ affect_z + delta_posneg_sb + ema_number +
                                (1 + affect_z + delta_posneg_sb + ema_number || PUNS_ID),
                              data = posneg_pre_empirical, family = binomial)

#v3plot_1b_model
summary(choice_model_pretrip)
Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
  Approximation) [glmerMod]
 Family: binomial  ( logit )
Formula: chose_pos ~ affect_z + delta_posneg_sb + ema_number + (1 + affect_z +  
    delta_posneg_sb + ema_number || PUNS_ID)
   Data: posneg_pre_empirical

      AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
   4169.8    4223.7   -2076.9    4153.8      6275 

Scaled residuals: 
     Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
-11.3439   0.0701   0.2108   0.3586   8.8838 

Random effects:
 Groups    Name            Variance  Std.Dev.
 PUNS_ID   (Intercept)     1.1926763 1.0921  
 PUNS_ID.1 affect_z        0.0476419 0.2183  
 PUNS_ID.2 delta_posneg_sb 0.0002821 0.0168  
 PUNS_ID.3 ema_number      0.0001323 0.0115  
Number of obs: 6283, groups:  PUNS_ID, 27

Fixed effects:
                 Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept)      1.376221   0.233412   5.896 3.72e-09 ***
affect_z         0.164042   0.060464   2.713  0.00667 ** 
delta_posneg_sb  0.032466   0.003477   9.338  < 2e-16 ***
ema_number      -0.002621   0.005779  -0.454  0.65012    
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Correlation of Fixed Effects:
            (Intr) affct_ dlt_p_
affect_z    -0.023              
dlt_psng_sb  0.007  0.009       
ema_number  -0.342  0.078 -0.005

MODEL: PREDICTED rt_z ~ delta_posneg_sb by affect_z WITH EFFECT OF TIME (pretrip)

Code 
# RT
# z score within pt
posneg_pre_empirical <- posneg_pre_empirical %>%
  group_by(PUNS_ID) %>%
  mutate(rt_s = rt / 1000) %>%
  mutate(rt_z = as.numeric(scale(rt_s))) %>%
  ungroup()

# create orthogonal  terms (setting degree to 2 create a lin and quadratic term )
poly_matrix_rt <- poly(posneg_pre_empirical$delta_posneg_sb, degree = 2)
posneg_pre_empirical$delta_posneg_sb_lin  <- poly_matrix_rt[, 1]
posneg_pre_empirical$delta_posneg_sb_quad <- poly_matrix_rt[, 2]


  # Attempt 1: Warning :Model failed to converge with 3 negative eigenvalues: -1.6e-01 -2.8e-01 -4.4e-01 and
              # boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
    # rt_model_pretrip <- lmerTest::lmer(
    #   rt_z ~ affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad + ema_number +
    #     (1 + affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad + ema_number | PUNS_ID),
    #   data = posneg_pre_empirical
    # )
  
  # Attempt 2: Warning :Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.420296 (tol = 0.002, component 1) and
              # Warning :Model is nearly unidentifiable: very large eigenvalue 
                  # - Rescale variables?;Model is nearly unidentifiable: large eigenvalue ratio
                  # - Rescale variables?
    # rt_model_pretrip <- lmerTest::lmer(
    #   rt_z ~ affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad + ema_number +
    #     (1 + affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad + ema_number || PUNS_ID),
    #   data = posneg_pre_empirical
    # )

  # Attempt 3: Warning :Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.364055 (tol = 0.002, component 1) and
              # Warning :Model is nearly unidentifiable: very large eigenvalue 
                  # - Rescale variables?;Model is nearly unidentifiable: large eigenvalue ratio
                  # - Rescale variables?
    # rt_model_pretrip <- lmerTest::lmer(
    #   rt_z ~ affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad + ema_number +
    #     (1 + affect_z + delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad + ema_number || PUNS_ID),
    #   data = posneg_pre_empirical)
  
  # Attempt 4: 
      rt_model_pretrip <- lmerTest::lmer(
        rt_z ~ affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad + ema_number +
          (1 + affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad || PUNS_ID),
        data = posneg_pre_empirical)
summary(rt_model_pretrip)
Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
lmerModLmerTest]
Formula: rt_z ~ affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad +  
    ema_number + (1 + affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin + delta_posneg_sb_quad ||  
    PUNS_ID)
   Data: posneg_pre_empirical

-1.9835 -0.6720 -0.2302  0.4273  8.0188

 PUNS_ID.1 affect_z                     6.698e-03 0.08184 
 PUNS_ID.2 delta_posneg_sb_lin          8.684e+01 9.31867

delta_posneg_sb_lin          -5.950e+00  2.098e+00  2.588e+01  -2.837  0.00874

PREDICTED CHOICE AND RT MODEL TABLES

Code 
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# CHOICE
choice_model_pretrip_tbl <- tbl_regression(choice_model_pretrip)

choice_model_pretrip_tbl_pretty <-
  tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(choice_model_pretrip_tbl),
    tab_spanner = c("**Pre-trip Data only**")
  )
#choice_model_pretrip_tbl_pretty

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# RT

rt_model_pretrip_tbl <- tbl_regression(rt_model_pretrip)

rt_model_pretrip_tbl_pretty <-
  tbl_merge(
    tbls = list(rt_model_pretrip_tbl),
    tab_spanner = c("**Pre-trip Data only**")
  )
#rt_model_pretrip_tbl_pretty


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# combined
combined_model_tbl <- tbl_merge(
  tbls = list(choice_model_pretrip_tbl, rt_model_pretrip_tbl),
  tab_spanner = c("**Predicted Choice**", "**Predicted RT (ms)**")
)

# Print the table
combined_model_tbl
Characteristic
Predicted Choice
Predicted RT (ms)
log(OR) 95% CI p-value Beta 95% CI p-value
affect_z 0.16 0.05, 0.28 0.007 -0.02 -0.06, 0.02 0.3
delta_posneg_sb 0.03 0.03, 0.04 <0.001


ema_number 0.00 -0.01, 0.01 0.7 -0.02 -0.02, -0.02 <0.001
delta_posneg_sb_lin


-5.9 -10, -1.6 0.009
delta_posneg_sb_quad


-9.2 -12, -6.3 <0.001
affect_z * delta_posneg_sb_lin


-1.7 -3.7, 0.25 0.086
Abbreviations: CI = Confidence Interval, OR = Odds Ratio

REGRESSION MODEL PREDICTED CHOICE AND RT PLOTS BY AFFECT

Code 
colors_affect_cont <- c("-1.5" = "#B2182B",
                        "0"    = "#808080",
                        "1.5"  = "#2166AC")
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
choice_pred_pretrip_plot <- plot_model(choice_model_pretrip, 
           type = "pred", 
           #terms = c("delta_posneg_sb [-100,-60,-20,0,20,60,100]", "affect_z [-1.5, 0, 1.5]"),
           terms = c("delta_posneg_sb [all]", "affect_z [-1.5, 0, 1.5]"),
           ci.lvl = 0.95,
           #colors = colors_affect_cont,
           title = NULL) +
  #geom_point() +
  #geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = predicted - std.error, ymax = predicted + std.error, fill = group),alpha = .20, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  #geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = predicted - std.error, ymax = predicted + std.error), width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 30) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 1),
   legend.key = element_blank(),
   legend.position = "none") +
  #xlab("Δ Self-Belief (Positive word - Negative word)") +
  ylab("Pred P(Chose Positive Word)") +  
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1), 
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)) +
   scale_color_manual(values = colors_affect_cont,
                      name = "Momentary Affect",
                      labels = c("Unpleasant", "Neutral", "Pleasant")) +
   scale_fill_manual(values = colors_affect_cont,
                       name = "Momentary Affect",
                       labels = c("Unpleasant", "Neutral", "Pleasant")) +
  ggtitle(NULL)



#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#

# prediction grid for plot
new_data <- expand.grid(
  delta_posneg_sb = seq(min(posneg_pre_empirical$delta_posneg_sb, na.rm = TRUE),
                        max(posneg_pre_empirical$delta_posneg_sb, na.rm = TRUE),
                        length.out = 100),
  affect_z = c(-1.5, 0, 1.5),
  ema_number = mean(posneg_pre_empirical$ema_number, na.rm = TRUE)
)


pred_poly <- predict(poly_matrix_rt, new_data$delta_posneg_sb)
new_data$delta_posneg_sb_lin  <- pred_poly[, 1]
new_data$delta_posneg_sb_quad <- pred_poly[, 2]


new_data$rt_z_pred <- predict(rt_model_pretrip, newdata = new_data, re.form = NA)
new_data$affect_z_factor <- as.factor(new_data$affect_z)

mm <- model.matrix(delete.response(terms(rt_model_pretrip)), new_data)
vcov_fixed <- vcov(rt_model_pretrip)
pred_var <- diag(mm %*% vcov_fixed %*% t(mm))
new_data$se <- sqrt(pred_var)
new_data$lwr <- new_data$rt_z_pred - 1.96 * new_data$se
new_data$upr <- new_data$rt_z_pred + 1.96 * new_data$se


# need y axis in s not z scores 
pt_rt_stats <- posneg_pre_empirical %>%
  mutate(rt_s = rt / 1000) %>%
  group_by(PUNS_ID) %>%
  summarise(pt_mean = mean(rt_s, na.rm = TRUE),
            pt_sd = sd(rt_s, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

grand_mean <- mean(pt_rt_stats$pt_mean)
grand_sd <- mean(pt_rt_stats$pt_sd)

new_data$rt_s_pred <- new_data$rt_z_pred * grand_sd + grand_mean
new_data$lwr_s <- new_data$lwr * grand_sd + grand_mean
new_data$upr_s <- new_data$upr * grand_sd + grand_mean


rt_pred_pretrip_plot <- ggplot(new_data, aes(x = delta_posneg_sb, y = rt_s_pred,
                     color = affect_z_factor, fill = affect_z_factor)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr_s, ymax = upr_s), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_affect_cont,
                     name = "Momentary Affect",
                     labels = c("Unpleasant", "Neutral", "Pleasant")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors_affect_cont,
                    name = "Momentary Affect",
                    labels = c("Unpleasant", "Neutral", "Pleasant")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -40, 0, 40, 80),
                     labels = c("-100 to -60", "-60 to -20", "-20 to 20", "20 to 60", "60 to 100")) +
  guides(fill = "none",
         color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = NA))) +
  labs(x = "ΔSelf-Belief (Positive word - Negative word)", 
       y = "Pred Reaction Time (s)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 30) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.0)) +

  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 32),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 32),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.key = element_blank())


#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
#(choice_pred_pretrip_plot / rt_pred_pretrip_plot)


#combined_pred_plot <- (choice_pred_pretrip_plot / rt_pred_pretrip_plot)

combined_pred_plot <- (choice_pred_pretrip_plot / rt_pred_pretrip_plot) +
  plot_annotation(
   # title = "Predicted p(chose positive word) and RT by Momentary Affect",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 23, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0, family = "mono")  # mono makes formulas legible
    )
  )
combined_pred_plot
Code 
# save 
if (!dir.exists(here::here("poster_figures"))) {
  dir.create(here::here("poster_figures"))
}
# ggsave(here::here("figures", "predicted_choice_rt_by_affect_pretrip_07.13.png"),
#        plot = combined_pred_plot,
#        width = 10, height = 17,
#        dpi = 300,
#        bg = "white")

ggsave(here::here("poster_figures", "predicted_choice_rt_by_affect_pretrip.svg"),
       plot = combined_pred_plot,
       width = 12, height = 19,
       bg = "white")

#️ RAW CHOICE AND RT PLOTS BY AFFECT: EMPIRICAL ️

Code 
colors_affect <- c(
  "unpleasant" = "#B2182B",
  "neutral"    = "#808080",
  "pleasant"   = "#2166AC"
)
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# LEFT PANEL: p(chose_pos) by affect bin, bar plot with within-pt SE and chance line

choice_by_affect_pt_pre <- posneg_pre_empirical %>%
  filter(!is.na(affect_z_bin)) %>%
  group_by(PUNS_ID, affect_z_bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_chose_pos = mean(chose_pos, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

choice_by_affect_pt_pre <- as.data.frame(choice_by_affect_pt_pre)

# within pt SE
choice_affect_summary_pre <- Rmisc::summarySEwithin(choice_by_affect_pt_pre,
                                                    measurevar = "mean_chose_pos",
                                                    withinvars = "affect_z_bin",
                                                    idvar = "PUNS_ID")

p_choice_bar_pre <- ggplot(choice_affect_summary_pre,
       aes(x = affect_z_bin,
           y = mean_chose_pos,
           fill = affect_z_bin)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.7, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_chose_pos - se, ymax = mean_chose_pos + se),
                width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors_affect) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Unpleasant", "Neutral", "Pleasant")) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1), 
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)) +
  labs(x = "Momentary Affect",
       y = "P(Choose Positive Word)") +
  # theme_minimal(base_size = 24) +
  # theme(
  #   axis.title = element_text(size = 24),
  #   axis.text  = element_text(size = 24),
  #   legend.position = "none")
  theme_minimal(base_size = 30) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.position = "none")

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# RIGHT PANEL: RT by delta_posneg_sb_bin x affect bin, points + lines + error bars

rt_by_pt_pre <- posneg_pre_empirical %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_posneg_sb_bin), !is.na(affect_z_bin)) %>%
  mutate(rt_s = rt / 1000) %>%
  group_by(PUNS_ID, delta_posneg_sb_bin, affect_z_bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_rt = mean(rt_s, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

rt_by_pt_pre <- as.data.frame(rt_by_pt_pre)

# within pt SE
rt_summary_pre <- Rmisc::summarySEwithin(rt_by_pt_pre,
                                         measurevar = "mean_rt",
                                         withinvars = c("delta_posneg_sb_bin", "affect_z_bin"),
                                         idvar = "PUNS_ID")

p_rt_lines_pre <- ggplot(rt_summary_pre,
       aes(x = delta_posneg_sb_bin,
           y = mean_rt,
           color = affect_z_bin,
           group = affect_z_bin)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.6) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_rt - se, ymax = mean_rt + se),
                width = 0.25, linewidth = 1.6) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = colors_affect,
    name = "Momentary Affect",
    labels = c("Unpleasant", "Neutral", "Pleasant")) +
  labs(x = "Δ Self-Belief (Positive word - Negative word)",
       y = "Reaction Time (s)") +
  # theme_minimal(base_size = 24) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.0)) +
  # theme(
  #   axis.title = element_text(size = 24),
  #   axis.text  = element_text(size = 28),
  #   axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
  #   legend.position = "bottom",
  #   legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
  #   legend.text  = element_text(size = 18))
  theme_minimal(base_size = 30) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.25, 2.0)) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 32),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 32),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 30))


#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
p_choice_bar_pre | p_rt_lines_pre
Code 
# save 
if (!dir.exists(here::here("poster_figures"))) {
  dir.create(here::here("poster_figures"))
}
# ggsave(here::here("figures", "raw_choice_bar_rt_lines_by_affect_pretrip_07.13.png"),
#        plot = (p_choice_bar_pre | p_rt_lines_pre),
#        width = 14, height = 6,
#        dpi = 300,
#        bg = "white")

ggsave(here::here("poster_figures", "raw_choice_bar_rt_lines_by_affect_pretrip.svg"),
       plot = (p_choice_bar_pre | p_rt_lines_pre),
       width = 26.08, height = 12.76,
       bg = "white")

###Convert simulated data col to look like emperical

Code 
# create affect_z_bin 
sim_data$affect_z_bin <- ifelse(sim_data$affect_z < -0.6, "unpleasant",
                           ifelse(sim_data$affect_z > 0.6, "pleasant", "neutral"))
sim_data$affect_z_bin <- factor(sim_data$affect_z_bin,
                                  levels = c("unpleasant", "neutral", "pleasant"))

# create delta_posneg_sb_bin

# pre
sim_data$delta_posneg_sb_bin <- cut(sim_data$delta_posneg_sb, 
                                         #breaks = seq(-100, 100, length.out = 6),# 5 bins
                                         breaks = seq(-0.5, 0.5, length.out = 6),# 5 bins
                                         labels = c("-100 to -60", "-60 to -20", "-20 to 20", "20 to 60", "60 to 100"),
                                         include.lowest = TRUE)
# as factor

sim_data$delta_posneg_sb_bin <- factor(sim_data$delta_posneg_sb_bin,
                                   levels = c("-100 to -60", "-60 to -20", "-20 to 20", "20 to 60", "60 to 100"))

# create chose_pos

sim_data$chose_pos  <- ifelse(sim_data$delta_valence == 0, NA,
                        ifelse(sim_data$delta_valence == 1,
                               ifelse(sim_data$response == 1, 1, 0),
                               ifelse(sim_data$response == 0, 1, 0)))

#️ RAW CHOICE AND RT PLOTS BY AFFECT: SIMULATED ️

Code 
colors_affect <- c(
  "unpleasant" = "#B2182B",
  "neutral"    = "#808080",
  "pleasant"   = "#2166AC"
)
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# LEFT PANEL: p(chose_pos) by affect bin, bar plot with within-pt SE and chance line

choice_by_affect_pt_pre <- sim_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(affect_z_bin)) %>%
  group_by(subject_id, affect_z_bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_chose_pos = mean(chose_pos, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

choice_by_affect_pt_pre <- as.data.frame(choice_by_affect_pt_pre)

# within pt SE
choice_affect_summary_pre <- Rmisc::summarySEwithin(choice_by_affect_pt_pre,
                                                    measurevar = "mean_chose_pos",
                                                    withinvars = "affect_z_bin",
                                                    idvar = "subject_id")


p_choice_cong <- sim_data %>%
    group_by(affect_z_bin) %>%
    summarise(mean = mean(chose_positive), se = sd(chose_positive) / sqrt(n())) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = affect_z_bin, y = mean, fill = affect_z_bin)) +
    geom_col(color = "black", width = 0.7) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se), width = 0.2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#B2182B", "#808080", "#2166AC")) +
   scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Unpleasant", "Neutral", "Pleasant")) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1), 
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)) +
  labs(x = "Momentary Affect",
       y = "P(Choose Positive Word)") +
  # theme_minimal(base_size = 24) +
  # theme(
  #   axis.title = element_text(size = 24),
  #   axis.text  = element_text(size = 24),
  #   legend.position = "none")
  theme_minimal(base_size = 30) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.position = "none")
  

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# RIGHT PANEL: RT by delta_posneg_sb_bin x affect bin, points + lines + error bars

rt_by_pt_pre <- sim_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_posneg_sb_bin), !is.na(affect_z_bin)) %>%
  #mutate(rt_s = rt / 1000) %>%
  group_by(subject_id, delta_posneg_sb_bin, affect_z_bin) %>%
  summarise(mean_rt = mean(rt, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

rt_by_pt_pre <- as.data.frame(rt_by_pt_pre)

# within pt SE
rt_summary_pre <- Rmisc::summarySEwithin(rt_by_pt_pre,
                                         measurevar = "mean_rt",
                                         withinvars = c("delta_posneg_sb_bin", "affect_z_bin"),
                                         idvar = "subject_id")

# p_rt_lines_pre <- ggplot(rt_summary_pre,
#        aes(x = delta_posneg_sb_bin,
#            y = mean_rt,
#            color = affect_z_bin,
#            group = affect_z_bin)) +
#   geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
#   geom_point(size = 3) +
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_rt - se, ymax = mean_rt + se),
#                 width = 0.25, linewidth = 0.6) +
#   scale_color_manual(
#     values = colors_affect,
#     name = "Momentary Affect",
#     labels = c("Unpleasant", "Neutral", "Pleasant")) +
#   labs(x = "Δ Self-Belief (Positive word - Negative word)",
#        y = "Reaction Time (s)") +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 24) +
#   coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.0)) +
#   theme(
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 24),
#     axis.text  = element_text(size = 20),
#     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
#     legend.position = "bottom",
#     legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
#     legend.text  = element_text(size = 18))

p_rt_lines_pre <- ggplot(rt_summary_pre,
       aes(x = delta_posneg_sb_bin,
           y = mean_rt,
           color = affect_z_bin,
           group = affect_z_bin)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.6) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_rt - se, ymax = mean_rt + se),
                width = 0.25, linewidth = 1.6) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = colors_affect,
    name = "Momentary Affect",
    labels = c("Unpleasant", "Neutral", "Pleasant")) +
  labs(x = "Δ Self-Belief (Positive word - Negative word)",
       y = "Reaction Time (s)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 30) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.0)) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 32),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 32),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 30))

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
p_choice_cong | p_rt_lines_pre
Code 
# save 
if (!dir.exists(here::here("poster_figures"))) {
  dir.create(here::here("poster_figures"))
}
# ggsave(here::here("figures", "simed_choice_bar_rt_lines_by_affect_07.13.png"),
#        plot = (p_choice_cong | p_rt_lines_pre),
#        width = 15.08, height = 8.76,
#        dpi = 300,
#        bg = "white")

ggsave(here::here("poster_figures", "simed_choice_bar_rt_lines_by_affect.svg"),
       plot = (p_choice_cong | p_rt_lines_pre),
       width = 26.08, height = 12.76,
       bg = "white")

DDM PREDICTED (SPLINE) AND EMPERICAL CHOICE + RT BY DSB ️

Code 
color_obs  <- "#FF7F0E"
color_pred <- "#fdae6b"

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#


spl_choice <- smooth.spline(merged_choice_full$dsb_bin, merged_choice_full$pred_mean)
choice_spline <- as.data.frame(predict(spl_choice,
                                       seq(min(merged_choice_full$dsb_bin),
                                           max(merged_choice_full$dsb_bin),
                                           length.out = 600)))

spl_rt <- smooth.spline(merged_rt_full$dsb_bin, merged_rt_full$pred_mean)
rt_spline <- as.data.frame(predict(spl_rt,
                                   seq(min(merged_rt_full$dsb_bin),
                                       max(merged_rt_full$dsb_bin),
                                       length.out = 600)))

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# CHOICE 
ppc_choice_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = choice_spline,
            aes(x = x, y = y, color = "Model Predictions"),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(data = merged_choice_full,
             aes(x = dsb_bin, y = mean, color = "Observed"),
             size = 4) +
  geom_errorbar(data = merged_choice_full,
                aes(x = dsb_bin,
                    ymin = mean - se,
                    ymax = mean + se,
                    color = "Observed"),
                width = 0.03, linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Observed" = color_obs,
                                "Model Predictions" = color_pred),
                     name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-0.5, 0, 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)) +
  ylab("P(Chose Right-side word)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 30) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 1),
    legend.key = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none")

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# RT

ppc_rt_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = rt_spline,
            aes(x = x, y = y, color = "Model Predictions"),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(data = merged_rt_full,
             aes(x = dsb_bin, y = mean, color = "Observed"),
             size = 4) +
  geom_errorbar(data = merged_rt_full,
                aes(x = dsb_bin,
                    ymin = mean - se,
                    ymax = mean + se,
                    color = "Observed"),
                width = 0.03, linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Observed" = color_obs,
                                "Model Predictions" = color_pred),
                     name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-0.5, 0, 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Δ Self-Belief (Right-side word − Left-side word)",
       y = "Reaction Time (s)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 30) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 32),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      colour = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.key = element_blank())


#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#
combined_ppc_plot <- (ppc_choice_plot / ppc_rt_plot)
combined_ppc_plot
Code 
# save
if (!dir.exists(here::here("poster_figures"))) {
  dir.create(here::here("poster_figures"))
}
# ggsave(here::here("figures", "ppc_choice_rt_by_dsb_full_07.13.png"),
#        plot = combined_ppc_plot,
#        width = 10, height = 17,
#        dpi = 300,
#        bg = "white")

ggsave(here::here("poster_figures", "ppc_choice_rt_by_dsb_full.svg"),
       plot = (combined_ppc_plot),
       width = 12, height = 19,
       bg = "white")
